name: Voice AI Agent
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure AI Speech
services.purpose: Real-time STT and TTS — speech recognition, voice synthesis, custom neural voice

dev.note: 5 hrs free STT, ~20 hrs total with pay-as-you-go overflow

enterprise.note: ~3,000 hrs STT, custom voice model, batch synthesis

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for conversational reasoning, intent resolution, and contextual dialogue management

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput for sub-second latency at scale

services.name: Azure Communication Services
services.purpose: PSTN calling, SIP trunking, WebRTC — inbound/outbound voice connectivity

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Voice agent runtime — WebSocket session manager, STT→LLM→TTS streaming pipeline, call state machine

services.name: Azure Redis Cache
services.purpose: Conversation session state, call context window, real-time turn tracking

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Call transcripts, conversation history, agent knowledge base, call analytics

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Speech API keys, OpenAI credentials, SIP trunk authentication secrets

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Call latency, STT/TTS performance, LLM response time, conversation quality metrics

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for simple FAQ and routing intents — reserve GPT-4o for complex multi-turn reasoning and escalation decisions
Enable STT streaming with partial results to start LLM processing before the caller finishes speaking — reduces perceived latency by 40%
Cache frequently asked question responses in Redis with 15-minute TTL — avoids redundant LLM calls for common intents
Use Communication Services Direct Routing with existing PBX to eliminate per-minute PSTN charges for enterprise telephony
Right-size Redis tier — Basic C0 handles ~50 concurrent calls; upgrade only when session count exceeds capacity
Implement call summarization with GPT-4o-mini post-call instead of real-time — saves 60% on transcript analysis tokens
